Projects.Name: Amazon.Lambda.Core
ChangelogMessages: Add preview ILambdaSerializer Serializer property to ILambdaContext (default-implemented to null on net8.0+) so user code can access the serializer registered with the runtime. Marked [Experimental("AWSLAMBDA001")]; class-library mode requires an updated managed Lambda runtime to populate this property. The Experimental flag will be removed in a follow-up release once the managed runtime is deployed.

Projects.Name: Amazon.Lambda.RuntimeSupport
ChangelogMessages: Propagate the registered ILambdaSerializer to the per-invocation ILambdaContext.Serializer. Surfaces the new preview ILambdaContext.Serializer (AWSLAMBDA001); the Experimental flag will be removed in a follow-up release once the managed runtime is deployed.

Projects.Name: Amazon.Lambda.TestUtilities
ChangelogMessages: Add Serializer setter to TestLambdaContext to mirror the new preview ILambdaContext.Serializer property. Marked [Experimental("AWSLAMBDA001")]; the Experimental flag will be removed in a follow-up release once the managed runtime is deployed.
